name: Solitaire Quest: Love Blossoms
short_description: In this game you'll find everything you need for an perfect vacation – vibrant locations, varying difficulty levels of solitaire, hidden object levels, and a heartwarming love story.
detailed_description:
Introducing the sequel to our captivating solitaire game, now set in an exotic environment with exciting new gameplay mechanics. Here, you'll find everything you need for a perfect vacation – vibrant locations, varying difficulty levels of solitaire, hidden object levels, and a heartwarming love story.

Vacation is the perfect time for changes in your personal life. Dive into the unpredictable tale of a love triangle and find out who wins the heroine's heart! Experience incredible adventures in love and on the game levels!

Game Features:
- 200 stunning and vibrant solitaire levels
- Hidden object levels with various mechanics
- Hidden gnome on solitaire locations
- Decorating your own flower shop
- A bright and unpredictable love story

Love, adventure, the ocean, and captivating solitaire levels are waiting for you! 🌺🌴💖

Jump into this tropical paradise, and let the magic of love and adventure sweep you off your feet!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
